skills.name: A Futile Attempt to Help
skills.description: Elisa offers a desperate prayer to overcome her fears and worries. Restores an ally's HP and grants them Holy Blessing for 2 turns. Grants self 2 stacks of Agitation. Recovery is proportional to self Max HP.

levels.description: Elisa offers a desperate prayer to overcome her fears and worries. Restores an ally's HP and grants them Holy Blessing for 2 turns. Grants self 2 stacks of Agitation. Recovery is proportional to self Max HP.

seEffects.buffDesc: Takes 25% reduced damage and increases self Effect RES by 25%.

skills.name: Let Us Pray Together
skills.description: Elisa's faith calls forth a miracle from within the depths of despair. Revives a fallen ally with 50% HP and increases their Action Gauge by 80%. Restores the ally's HP and grants them Holy Blessing for 2 turns with a 75% chance, then increases their Action Gauge by 40% if the ally is not fallen. Grants self 2 stacks of Agitation. Recovery is proportional to self Max HP.

levels.description: Elisa's faith calls forth a miracle from within the depths of despair. Revives a fallen ally with 50% HP and increases their Action Gauge by 80%. Restores the ally's HP and grants them Holy Blessing for 2 turns with a 75% chance, then increases their Action Gauge by 40% if the ally is not fallen. Grants self 2 stacks of Agitation. Recovery is proportional to self Max HP.

levels.description: Increases Elisa's Max HP by 5%.

Increases Elisa's Max HP by 5%. Increases Elisa's Recovery by 15% if self HP is 50% or above when using A Futile Attempt to Help. Removes all Agitation stacks and grants self an extra turn if Agitation is at max stacks when using Please Go Back on self turn.

seEffects.buffDesc: This stat displays increase in Healing Given.
Gains an extra turn.
